meta.title: I Am Really Sorry — Create a Funny Apology Website for Free
meta.description: Make a personalized apology page with 3D animations, meme sounds, and a runaway No button. The funniest way to say sorry to anyone — girlfriend, boyfriend, friend, family, or coworker.
meta.keywords: apology website, sorry page generator, funny apology online, i am sorry website, apology to girlfriend, apology to friend, apology to family, sorry page maker free, interactive apology, runaway no button

hero.subtitle: A formal declaration of
hero.heading: I'M SORRY
hero.scrollHint: Scroll down (I have a lot to say)

meter.title: Let me quantify my remorse
meter.label: How sorry I am:
meter.error: ERROR: Sorry level exceeds maximum capacity
meter.footnote: Scientists confirm: no one in history has ever been this sorry. The scale was not prepared.

reasons.title: I know what I did wrong

items.title: I was a clown
items.text: Not the funny kind. The scary kind that ruins birthday parties.

items.title: My brain left the chat
items.text: It went on vacation and forgot to tell me. Zero thoughts, just vibes (bad ones).

items.title: I was acting like trash
items.text: And not even recyclable trash. Straight-to-landfill behavior.

items.title: I know I messed up
items.text: If my apology were a movie, it'd be a 12-part series. With director's cuts.

promises.title: My solemn promises
promises.subtitle: (Pinky promise, cross my heart, the whole thing)
items: I'll actually listen when you're talking (not just nod while thinking about food)
I'll remember the important dates (setting 47 reminders as we speak)
I'll stop doing that thing that annoys you (you know the one)
I'll give you the TV remote without a fight (most of the time)
I'll admit I'm wrong faster (starting now: I WAS WRONG)

forgive.title: Now the moment of truth...
forgive.question: So... do you forgive me?
forgive.hint: (The No button is getting scared... maybe just click Yes? 😅)
forgive.successSub: I promise to be better. You mean everything to me.

footer.madeWith: Made with 100% genuine remorse and a sprinkle of desperation
footer.copyright: © 2026 iamreallysorry.com — All rights reserved by guilt

landing.h1: Create a Personalized Apology Website — Free & Instant
landing.h2_1: The Most Creative Way to Say Sorry to Anyone
landing.p1: Stop sending boring text messages that get left on read. Create a personalized, interactive apology page with 3D animations, meme sounds, and a No button that literally runs away. Works for anyone — your partner, friend, family member, or coworker. Share the link and watch them go from angry to smiling.
steps: Share the link — they can't say no
features: Runaway No button (they literally can't say no!)
Meme sound effects (sad violin, vine boom, airhorn)
Sorry meter that dramatically breaks past 100%
Confetti explosion when they forgive you
Works for any relationship — partner, friend, family, coworker

faq.a: Yes, completely free. No signup, no hidden fees, no limits on how many apology pages you create.
Anyone! Girlfriend, boyfriend, wife, husband, friend, family member, coworker — the page works for any relationship.
Yes! Enter their name and choose the language. The entire page is personalized for them.
Absolutely. Fully responsive with touch support for the runaway No button.
Just copy and send the link via text, WhatsApp, DM, or email. The name is embedded in the URL so they get a personalized experience.
English, Spanish, Portuguese, French, German, Russian, Turkish, Arabic, Hindi, Japanese, and Korean.

creator.introDontWorry: Don't worry. We've all been there. Let's fix this.
creator.scenarioTitle: Alright, what did you do this time? 💀
creator.scenarioSubtitle: Be honest. We don't judge here.

forgot.label: Forgot something important
forgot.reaction: Classic move. Forgetting stuff is an art form for you at this point 💀

stupid.label: Said something stupid
stupid.reaction: Yeah that tracks. Words are hard sometimes, huh? 😂

distant.label: Was being distant / ignored them
distant.reaction: Phone addiction? Emotional unavailability? Both? Say no more 📱

argument.label: Started a dumb argument
argument.reaction: Was it about something dumb? (it was about something dumb) 🙄

promise.label: Broke a promise
promise.reaction: Oof. Broken promises hit different. Good thing you're here though 🩹

rude.label: Was rude or insensitive
rude.reaction: Words hurt, and you know it. Let's make this right 🫣

lied.label: Lied or broke their trust
lied.reaction: Trust is fragile. But showing up here means something 🫡

ghosted.label: Ghosted / disappeared on them
ghosted.reaction: Disappearing act? Time to reappear with a bang 👻➡️🎭

unknown.label: I don't even know tbh
unknown.reaction: You don't know?? That's somehow worse 😭 But we'll fix it

everything.label: Everything. All of it.
everything.reaction: DOWN BAD. We got work to do. Let's make this apology legendary 🫡

creator.relationshipTitle: Who do you owe this apology to? 🎯
creator.toneTitle: What vibe are we going for? 🎭
creator.toneSubtitle: Pick the tone of your apology.
creator.nameTitle: Who's the victim of your crimes? 🕵️
creator.nameSubtitle: Name of the person you need to apologize to.
creator.nameConfirm: Alright, {name} is about to get the most dramatic apology of their life 🎭
creator.langSubtitle: The apology will be in this language. Choose wisely.
creator.resultSubtitle: Send this link to {name}. The rest is up to fate (and their sense of humor).
proTips: Send it at the right moment (not in the middle of an argument 😅)
Works best if they open it on their phone
The No button is literally impossible to click — you're welcome
Tell them to turn up the volume for maximum dramatic effect 🎻
creator.makeAnother: Make another apology (how many people did you upset?? 😂)
